summary: Discovery found 4 verified official sources: the AR student GenAI guidelines page, the EDC GenAI teaching/learning page, the EDC academic integrity page, and the ITS M365 Copilot Chat page. Two sources were rejected: the PolyU homepage (generic) and the SD research integrity PDF (research_showcase_only).
